# Veloste

## About
Veloste is a design-focused web development studio creating unique websites that turn views into customers and clearly showcase what makes each business different.

## Services and Pricing
- Web development and design services: custom quote based on project scope, timeline, and complexity
- Interaction and motion design: custom quote based on project requirements
- Immersive 3D web experiences (Three.js / R3F): custom quote based on technical scope
- Ongoing design-development support: custom monthly quote based on support scope

## Locations
- Calgary, Alberta

## Contact
- Phone: (825) 521 4542
- Website: https://veloste.com
- Email: contact@veloste.com
- Hours: 24/7 (available any time for inquiries, Mountain Time)
- Social: [INSERT SOCIAL URLS]

## Service Area
Canada and United States (priority cities: Calgary, Edmonton, and Red Deer, Alberta)

## Key Facts
- Founder/Director: Jack Miller
- In-house team (no outsourcing)
- Small specialized team focused on custom client delivery
- Each project is tailored to client-specific needs and goals
- Technical stack includes React, TypeScript, and real-time 3D rendering
- [INSERT YEARS IN BUSINESS / PROJECT COUNT / CERTIFICATIONS / WARRANTY DETAILS]

## What Makes Us Different
Veloste works with a small in-house team to keep delivery focused and adaptable. Projects are built from scratch for each client instead of template reuse, with process and implementation shaped around each business's goals.

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What does a typical Veloste project cost?
A: Pricing is project-specific and based on scope, timeline, and complexity. We provide a custom quote after discussing your goals and requirements.

Q: Do you offer fixed-price projects or retainers?
A: We support both one-off scoped projects and ongoing support arrangements. The structure is agreed after discovery based on your needs.

Q: How long does a project usually take?
A: Timeline depends on project scope, revisions, and technical complexity. We provide a delivery timeline in your proposal.

Q: Do you build 3D websites, and will they be fast?
A: Yes. We use performance budgets, progressive enhancement, and fallbacks so immersive experiences stay usable across devices and network conditions.

Q: Do you work with in-house teams?
A: Yes. We frequently collaborate with founders, product teams, and internal designers/developers as an embedded design-dev partner.

Q: What industries do you serve?
A: We work with businesses that want distinctive digital experiences and stronger conversion-focused websites.

Q: Do you provide support after launch?
A: Yes. Post-completion issue support is free for launch-related fixes if anything unexpected appears after go-live.

Q: How do we start?
A: Send your goals, timeline, and budget via the contact page or email. We follow with a discovery call and recommended scope.
